messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0099",
  "title": "目录 Contents",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:
## 目录 Contents

01

中国移动游戏市场现状分析

02

海外移动游戏市场现状分析

03

移动游戏典型产品&企业案例分析

《燕云十六声》：以独特历史切口形成独特市场定位，从备受质疑到全球破圈的逆袭之路；心动网络：理想主义底色下的“不着急”与长线定力。

04

全球移动游戏市场发展趋势

message.content:
This section functions as a table of contents, enabling retrieval of the report’s structural scope and key analytical focus. It answers questions regarding:
- **Topics:** Current status of the Chinese mobile game market, current status of the overseas mobile game market, case studies of typical products and companies, and global market development trends.
- **Entities:** 《燕云十六声》 (game) and 心动网络/XD Inc. (company).
- **Claims/Themes:** 《燕云十六声》 achieved global breakout success despite initial skepticism by leveraging a unique historical market positioning; 心动网络 operates with an idealistic, patient strategy emphasizing long-term development.
- **Dates, Definitions, Procedures, Tables, Figures, Metrics, Evidence Types:** None are present in this section.
This section is best used to identify which regional markets, specific case studies, and overarching industry trends are covered in the full document.
